author: DAppNode Association <admin@dappnode.io>
description: Runs deterministic baseline-to-candidate upgrade tests for Dappnode packages on a dedicated disposable Dappnode. It checks stable container-running state, records bounded evidence, performs advisory log analysis, cleans up the target package, and reports a signed result to a configured callback.

exposable.description: Authenticated package test submission and result API
exposable.name: Package Harness API

name: package-harness.dnp.dappnode.eth
shortDescription: Disposable-node upgrade tests for Dappnode package builds

warnings.onInstall: This package performs destructive install, upgrade, removal, and volume-deletion operations. Use it only on a dedicated disposable test Dappnode and explicitly acknowledge destructive testing in the setup wizard.
warnings.onRemove: Removing the harness deletes its persisted run history. It does not automatically remove dependencies left behind by earlier package tests.
